title: Text-to-World Diffusion Generation
description: Text-conditioned world generation: prompt upsampling, tokenizer decoding, model inference, and output generation

activity_flow.activity: START: demo() or external caller invokes pipeline.generate(prompt, negative_prompt, word_limit_to_skip_upsampler)
[UPSAMPLE] enable_prompt_upsampler? YES → count words in prompt
activity_flow.branch: word_count > word_limit_to_skip_upsampler → skip upsampler, log and continue to step 5

activity_flow.activity: _run_prompt_upsampler_on_prompt_with_offload(prompt): optionally _load_prompt_upsampler_model() → create_prompt_upsampler() → run_chat_completion(prompt_upsampler, prompt) → returns upsampled_prompt; optionally _offload_prompt_upsampler_model()

Build prompts list: [prompt] or [prompt, negative_prompt] → _run_text_embedding_on_prompt_with_offload(prompts): optionally _load_text_encoder_model() → CosmosT5TextEncoder.encode_prompts([prompt]) per prompt → returns (embeddings, masks); optionally _offload_text_encoder_model()

_run_model(): get_video_batch(model, prompt_embedding, height, width, fps, num_video_frames) → returns (data_batch, state_shape) → generate_world_from_text(model, state_shape, data_batch, guidance, num_steps, seed) → returns sample: torch.Tensor [B,C,T,H,W]
optionally _offload_network() → _run_tokenizer_decoding(sample): model.decode(sample) → clamp + normalize → permute to [T,H,W,C] → .to(uint8).cpu().numpy() → returns video: np.ndarray
[GUARD on video] disable_guardrail? NO → _run_guardrail_on_video_with_offload(video) → guardrail_presets.run_video_guardrail(video, video_guardrail) → returns video or None
RETURN (video: np.ndarray [T,H,W,C], prompt: str) to caller
Caller: save_video(video, fps, H, W, video_save_path) + write prompt to .txt file

key_methods: generate(prompt, negative_prompt, word_limit_to_skip_upsampler) → tuple[ndarray, str] | None
decision_points: enable_prompt_upsampler? → run or skip prompt upsampling
word_count > word_limit_to_skip_upsampler? → skip upsampler for long prompts
offload_prompt_upsampler? → dynamic load/unload of prompt upsampler
offload_network? → dynamic load/unload of diffusion transformer
offload_text_encoder_model? → dynamic load/unload of T5 encoder
offload_guardrail_models? → dynamic load/unload of guardrail models
negative_prompt provided? → embed separately and pass to model
guardrail blocks input prompt? → return None
guardrail blocks upsampled prompt? → return None
guardrail blocks generated video? → return None
data_flow: input: prompt: str → guardrail check → upsampler → guardrail check
upsampled_prompt: str → T5 encoder → prompt_embedding: torch.Tensor
sample → model.decode() → normalize → video: np.ndarray [T,H,W,C] uint8
video → video guardrail → (video, prompt) returned to caller
caller: video → save_video() → .mp4 file; prompt → .txt file
important_notes: Offloading flags control GPU memory: each major component (network, tokenizer, T5, guardrail, prompt_upsampler) can be dynamically loaded/unloaded. The pipeline validates safety at 3 points: input prompt, upsampled prompt, generated video. Prompt upsampler skipped if word_count > word_limit_to_skip_upsampler (default 250). Output: uint8 numpy [T,H,W,C] + final prompt string. Multi-GPU supported via context parallel (Megatron). Models: 7B or 14B DiT, T5-11B encoder, CV8x8x8 tokenizer.
